objective: Follow docs/ALEA-EXECUTION-PLAN.md strictly. Read the file to find the next incomplete milestone in sequence. Implement it exactly as described (files, acceptance criteria). Create a feature branch off develop, run pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test, open PR targeting develop. Then move to the next milestone. Test files in __tests__/ are exclusively owned by the tester agent — developer must never touch them. Never merge into develop — only open PRs.
